_doc: Ratchet baseline for scripts/check-convention-guard.cjs. rule3_pending may only SHRINK: fix a route (add auditServerEvent) -> remove its key; confirmed false positive -> move to rule3_exempt with a reason. A NEW mutating route absent from both buckets FAILS the gate.

_handlerLevel_rule3_guardInvisible.restrictedZones: RESOLVED — /define now audits (action restrictedZones.define); file already audited /entry-event
_handlerLevel_rule3_guardInvisible.billing: RESOLVED — /verify (billing.verify) + /checkout (billing.checkout) now audit; file already audited webhooks + mark-paid
_handlerLevel_rule3_guardInvisible.loneWorker: check-in/end-session state changes — audit added in Ola 2 (PR #628); kept here as a guard-invisible note

rule3_exempt.cphsMinute: read-only aggregation; produces an in-memory draft, never persisted (guard matched an adapter ctor)
rule3_exempt.dataQuality: pure read; scanAll() is deterministic over already-fetched data, no Firestore writes
rule3_exempt.equipment: single GET; EquipmentAdapter.listByStatus is read-only (guard matched `new EquipmentAdapter`)
rule3_exempt.inbox: pure read aggregation over listByStatus/listPendingExecutiveReview, no writes
rule3_exempt.incidentTrends: read-only GET; computes a leading-indicator snapshot from incidents, no writes
rule3_exempt.loto: single read-only GET; adapter.list* only, no writes (guard matched adapter ctor)
rule3_exempt.openapi: GET-only public static OpenAPI spec + Swagger UI; res.set() headers matched, no Firestore writes
rule3_exempt.preShiftRisk: read-only GET; aggregates collections + pure composeShiftRiskPanel, no writes
rule3_exempt.riskRadar: read-only GET; in-memory buildRepeatingRiskRadar over incidents, no writes
rule3_exempt.softBlocking: pure compute, zero Firestore writes; client persists the override-audit struct downstream
rule3_exempt.systemEvents: internal event-bus relay (infra enqueue to system_events, idempotency-deduped), not a business record
rule3_exempt.vulnerability: read-only GET; adapter.getLatest snapshot, no writes
rule3_exempt.waste: read-only GET; adapter.list* only, no writes
rule3_exempt.workerReadiness: read-only GET; joins collections + pure computeReadiness(), no writes
rule3_exempt.billing/iapReceipts: moved VERBATIM from billing.ts in the D3 split (PR #839) — same handlers, zero behavior change; the validate-receipt paths update entitlements inside the upstream IAP verification flow whose audit posture is covered by the original 'billing' baseline note above. Adding audit here would be a behavior change out of scope for a movement-only split; tracked as follow-up with the billing audit sweep.
rule3_exempt.ds67: read-only compute: POST simulate + GET prefill run the pure DS 67 engine over incident aggregates, zero Firestore writes (documented inline in src/server/routes/ds67.ts)

_handlerLevel_rule3_derivedCacheExempt._doc: Handlers that write on a READ/infra path but persist only a derived projection, cache mirror, or telemetry — no NEW business record. The file passes the file-level guard via its other audited handlers; logged here so the gap is documented, not silent (TODO.md Rule #1).
_handlerLevel_rule3_derivedCacheExempt.dataConfidence: GET /:projectId/data-confidence best-effort writes data_confidence_snapshots, mirroring an already-derived overallScore
_handlerLevel_rule3_derivedCacheExempt.wisdomCapsule: GET /wisdom-capsule/today writes a deterministic-id cache mirror + idempotent safety-learning zettelkasten node, both derived from already-recorded findings
_handlerLevel_rule3_derivedCacheExempt.misc: POST /erp/sync writes erp_sync_logs sync-attempt telemetry (infra integration), not a domain record
_handlerLevel_rule3_derivedCacheExempt.externalAuditPortal: GET /audit-portal/public/:token appends to access_logs — the access-trail write IS the audit record (unauthed public endpoint)
